gaps.description: ask.ts uses a non-standard tool loop: after one round of tool calls it injects results as plain text and forces a final call without tools, rather than continuing the agentic loop for up to MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS rounds. Multi-turn tool use is effectively broken.
images field is collected in the first tool-call branch but omitted from the return value in the final-response branch (ask.ts:68). AgenticResult.images can be silently lost.

Provider 'custom' is declared in AgenticConfig but createProvider() falls through to openai for unknown providers with no error or custom-provider hook. Custom/proxy provider support is not implemented.
code_exec uses new Function() (eval-equivalent) with no real sandbox. The vision doc notes this is a placeholder; isolated-vm or quickjs-emscripten is not yet integrated.
No memory, chain, or graph modules — consistent with vision's explicit non-goals. No gap.
Provider auto-detection (detectProvider) relies on apiKey prefix and baseUrl string match; no validation or error for missing/invalid apiKey.
